YieldMax™ Introduces Short Option Income Strategy ETF on MicroStrategy, Inc. (MSTR)

holdings.infoBox: WNTR is an equity ETF with a total of 19 individual holdings.

overview.description: The YieldMax MSTR Short Option Income Strategy ETF (WNTR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund aims to provide current income and inverse exposure to MicroStrategy stock (MSTR), with a cap on potential gains. The fund employs an actively managed synthetic covered put strategy, using US Treasurys as collateral WNTR was launched on Mar 26, 2025 and is issued by YieldMax.
